confidence.label: Partial live data
confidence.text: Live dashboard currently uses reliable GHL conversation ownership/unread pressure plus recent Retell call activity. It is manager-useful now, but not yet full rep scorecard coverage.

repCards.name: Derek
repCards.needsAttentionReason: Queue looks relatively clean in the current sample.

managerActions: Pull the top unread inbound queues first. Those are the cleanest manager interventions.
Coach the rep with the highest stale conversation count before pushing more new leads.
Use the Retell feed to spot recent no-connect / voicemail patterns and tighten callback handling.
Treat unanswered inbound conversations as the priority leak before more reporting vanity work.

recentQueue.lastMessageBody: Man I'm going to hold off on that for a while. I'm in the process of cleaning up my position. I'll stay in contact when I'm in better position!
Sounds good I’ll keep you posted!

Lender updated on Insurance attached



Frank Nolan

(323) 620-5608








On Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 05:33:24 PM CDT, Yahoo <fjnolan@yahoo.com> wrote:




I have let the rep know and she is in a company meeting the rest of the day, so she said she would get it back to me in the
morning.

Hey, sorry I didn't get back with you, ended up going in a partnership with a guy on it

Neither, I mainly do my own searching off-market. There are no wholesalers in my immediate area. Also a guy I own some property with is a real estate attorney so he sends me properties every now and then. 

I'm honestly not a super aggressive searcher or flipper at the moment. My main bread and butter is contracting work so I look for properties that could make me some money, but that would also be a good advertisement for my business via a complicated or unique situation/remodel.
I honestly do think I’m going to be able to get this done for you unless the deed is transferred, I’m sorry I’m striking out so bad
Hey Elliot! It’s Nate from X. Coming across any good deals?
Sorry for the slow response, I can’t do anything with primary residences. I asked my lenders and there’s no way around it I’m sorry
Yeah get it under your belt then you’ll be ready to roll!!
